content: Give me a python implementation of quicksort
Now, make the same algorithm in Haskell

The haskell code for quicksort is as follows:

quicksort [] = []
quicksort (p:ps) = qs ++ [x] ++ qs'
    where (qs, qs') = splitAt 1 ps
          x       = p
